ddls:
CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "claim_text" TEXT /* Text of the claim */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of claim (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the claim */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the claim was posted */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date the claim was posted */,
  "claim_media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media (if the claim is an image or video) */,
  "claim_source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., website, social media, news outlet) */,
  "claim_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., under review, verified, debunked) */,
  "fact_check_method" TEXT /* Method used for fact-checking (e.g., expert review, AI analysis) */,
  "claim_confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the claim (e.g., 0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "claim_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords extracted from the claim for better categorization and search */,
  "claim_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the claim (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fact_checks" (
  "fact_check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fact-check */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim being fact-checked */,
  "fact_checker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fact-checker */,
  "fact_check_date" TEXT /* Date the fact-check was performed */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the claim (e.g., true, false, unknown) */,
  "explanation" TEXT /* Explanation of the fact-check result */,
  "fact_check_method" TEXT /* Method used for fact-checking (e.g., expert review, AI analysis) */,
  "fact_check_confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the fact-check result (e.g., 0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "fact_check_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords extracted from the fact-check explanation */,
  "fact_check_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the fact-check explanation (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fact_check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fact_checks_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fact_checks_fact_checker_id FOREIGN KEY ("fact_checker_id") REFERENCES fact_checkers ("fact_checker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fact_checkers" (
  "fact_checker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fact-checker */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the fact-checker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fact-checker */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the fact-checker belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the fact-checker */,
  "expertise_area" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., medical, epidemiology, public health) */,
  "verified_status" TEXT /* Verification status (e.g., verified, unverified) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the fact-checker based on performance (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fact_checker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fact_checkers_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., government, non-profit, private) */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the organization's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "verified_status" TEXT /* Verification status (e.g., verified, unverified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the language (e.g., en, fr, es) */,
  "native_name" TEXT /* Name of the language in its native script */,
  "iso_639_1_code" TEXT /* ISO 639-1 code for the language (e.g., en, fr, es) */,
  "iso_639_2_code" TEXT /* ISO 639-2 code for the language (e.g., eng, fra, spa) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the country (e.g., US, NG) */,
  "iso_3166_1_alpha_2_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the country (e.g., US, NG) */,
  "iso_3166_1_alpha_3_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country (e.g., USA, NGR) */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency code */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media platform */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the social media platform */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for integrating with the social media platform */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for integrating with the social media platform */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the social media platform integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_sources" (
  "claim_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim source */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., website, social media, news outlet) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "source_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source type */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., CNN, BBC) */,
  "source_reputation_score" REAL /* Reputation score of the source (e.g., 0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_sources_source_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_type_id") REFERENCES source_types ("source_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_sources_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "covid_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each COVID-19 data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "recoveries" INTEGER /* Number of recoveries */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the data is from */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source where the data is from */,
  "vaccination_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding vaccination data entry */,
  "hospitalized_cases" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalized cases */,
  "icu_cases" INTEGER /* Number of ICU cases */,
  "tests_conducted" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("covid_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_vaccination_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("vaccination_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES claim_sources ("claim_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "doses_administered" INTEGER /* Number of doses administered */,
  "people_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people vaccinated */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the data is from */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source where the data is from */,
  "covid_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding COVID-19 data entry */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate (e.g., percentage of the population vaccinated) */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna, AstraZeneca) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_covid_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("covid_data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("covid_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES claim_sources ("claim_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., fact-checker, researcher, administrator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_types" (
  "source_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the source type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the source type (e.g., website, social media, news outlet) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_type_id")
)
